headline: 影视圈新片热映，痴迷领跑今日
headlineEn: New Movies Heat Up, 'Obsession' Leads Today
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》持续火热，本周《末日地堡》《福尔摩斯小姐3》等片备受关注。未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' remains hot. This week features 'Silo' and 'Enola Holmes 3'. Upcoming blockbusters like 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' loom.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片《超级少女》《玩具总动员5》蓄势待发
industryHighlights.en: New this week: 'Supergirl' and 'Toy Story 5' ready to launch

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》热度不减，续集口碑上扬
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' maintains heat, sequel buzz rises

industryHighlights.text: 未来大片《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档引期待
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' release sparks anticipation

industryHighlights.text: 《海洋奇缘：启航》《奥德赛》等动画新作亮相
industryHighlights.en: Animated features 'Moana: The Voyage' and 'The Odyssey' debut

industryHighlights.text: 恐怖片《鬼玩人6：燃烧》公布新物料
industryHighlights.en: Horror 'Evil Dead 6: Burn' releases new materials
